name: de-medicaid-policy
note: DMAP (Delaware Medical Assistance Program) Provider Policy Manuals — DNN/Bring2mind DMX repo (Gainwell). 31 per-provider-type PDFs in folder EntryId=36. Download URL pattern: ...?Command=Core_Download&EntryId=<id> (302→API endpoint, GET only — HEAD 405). DE is mostly managed care; no FFS NEMT manual (brokered via ModivCare).

docs.title: Durable Medical Equipment Provider Specific Policy Manual
Independent Lab Provider Specific Policy Manual
Home Health Provider Specific Policy Manual
Private Duty Nursing Provider Specific Policy Manual
Developmental Disabilities Lifespan HCBS Waiver Provider Specific
Long Term Care Community Services Provider Specific Policy Manual
Adult Behavioral Health Service Certification and Reimbursement Provider Specific
Outpatient Hospital Provider Specific Policy Manual

_comment: DMAP Document Repository (medicaidpublications.dhss.delaware.gov) — DNN portal w/ ComponentArt grid; folder EntryId=36 = Provider Policy Manuals (31 PDFs + Archive subfolder). EntryIds are stable per doc; short URL ?Command=Core_Download&EntryId=<n> 302s to /DesktopModules/Bring2mind/DMX/API/Entries/Download (GET only). curl works, no login. No standalone NEMT/Transportation manual — DE NEMT is managed-care brokered. Practitioner manual (887) covers physician E&M; web-search alias EntryId=1361 may be a newer version of same.
